query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS upload_errors (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  uploadId VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  documentId VARCHAR(255),
  fileName VARCHAR(500),
  errorMessage TEXT,
  errorStack TEXT,
  stage VARCHAR(100),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
